name: Soft Chocolate Chunk Cookies/Family Circle
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 325°F. Lightly grease 2 baking sheets.
Combine flour and baking soda in a bowl.
Beat butter, peanut butter, granulated sugar, and brown sugar until light and fluffy.
Add egg and vanilla; beat until combined.
Stir in the flour mixture, chopped walnuts, and chocolate chunks.
Drop 2 tablespoons batter per cookie on prepared sheets, spacing about 2 inches apart.
Bake for 15 to 17 minutes or until golden brown around the edges.
Cool on sheets for 3 minutes before transferring to racks to cool completely.
